title: 10 best herbal creams for tooth decay
description: Thymus serpyllum, also known as creeping thyme, creams helps with tooth decay because of its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The thymol present in the herb inhibits the growth of bacteria, such as Streptococcus mutans, which are a primary cause of tooth decay. Additionally, the herb's ability to reduce inflammation can help alleviate gum inflammation and promote a healthy oral environment. This leads to a reduction in the incidence of tooth decay and gum disease, promot...
